headline: The True Cost of Asylum. Nobody published it. We did.

stats.label: Total annual cost to UK taxpayers
Minimum cost per taxpayer per year
Hotels alone. 29% of people. 76% of budget.
Local authority costs. Councils carry the load.

verdict: Over £155 per taxpayer. Every year. Hotels are only 36% of the bill.
source: asylumstats.co.uk | NAO, Home Office, MoJ, HMCTS
